languages.text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, служил на флагмане до тех пор, пока его руки могли держать скальпель. Когда возраст и усталость забрали у Вивисектора его силы и талант, он был с почетом обращен в медицинский сервочереп генетором Ферренцом и продолжил свой труд на благо Вольного Торговца.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector's remains were used in the creation of a medicae servo-skull by Genetor Ferrenz. This great honour allowed him to continue his work for the Rogue Trader.
languages.original_text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, служил на флагмане до тех пор, пока его руки могли держать скальпель. languages.text: バイオニカ・セクターの外科医長に任命されたマルタナスは、旗艦で手術を続ける。手先が衰え、老いと疲労が彼の才能を奪った時、彼はジェネター・フェレンツに敬意をもって奉仕者として迎えられ、ローグ・トレーダーのために働き続けた。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: バイオニカ・セクターの外科医長に任命されたマルタナスは、旗艦で手術を続ける。手先が衰え、老いと疲労が彼の才能を奪った時、彼はジェネター・フェレンツに敬意をもって奉仕者として迎えられ、ローグ・トレーダーのために働き続けた。

languages.text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务。只要双手还能握住手术刀，他就坚持在旗舰上服役。在衰老夺走他的力量与才华后，基因士费伦茨将他体面地改造成机仆，使他得以继续为行商浪人效力。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务。只要双手还能握住手术刀，他就坚持在旗舰上服役。在衰老夺走他的力量与才华后，基因士费伦茨将他体面地改造成机仆，使他得以继续为行商浪人效力。

languages.text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, servit à bord du vaisseau amiral aussi longtemps que ses mains purent tenir un scalpel. Lorsque l'âge et la fatigue finirent par lui ôter sa force et son talent, il fut honorablement servitorisé par le genetor Ferrenz et poursuivit ainsi son travail pour {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, servit à bord du vaisseau amiral aussi longtemps que ses mains purent tenir un scalpel. Lorsque l'âge et la fatigue finirent par lui ôter sa force et son talent, il fut honorablement servitorisé par le genetor Ferrenz et poursuivit ainsi son travail pour {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}.

languages.text: El vivisector Martinax, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, sirvió en la nave insignia hasta que sus manos ya no podían sostener el bisturí. Cuando la edad y el agotamiento le arrebataron las fuerzas y el talento, el vivisector recibió el honor de la servidorización a manos del genetor Ferrenz y continuó trabajando para {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, elleri neşter tutabildiği sürece sancak gemisinde hizmet etti. Yaşlılık ve yorgunluk gücünü ve yeteneğini elinden aldığında, Dirikesimci Genetör Ferrenz tarafından onurlu bir şekilde hizmetöre dönüştürüldü ve Hür Tacir için çalışmaya devam etti.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, elleri neşter tutabildiği sürece sancak gemisinde hizmet etti. Yaşlılık ve yorgunluk gücünü ve yeteneğini elinden aldığında, Dirikesimci Genetör Ferrenz tarafından onurlu bir şekilde hizmetöre dönüştürüldü ve Hür Tacir için çalışmaya devam etti.

languages.text: Vivisektor Martinax, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, diente auf dem Flaggschiff, solange seine Hände ein Skalpell halten konnten. Als ihn Alter und Erschöpfung seiner Kraft und Fähigkeiten beraubten, wurde der Vivisektor von Genetor Ferrenz ehrenhaft servitorisiert und setzte seine Arbeit für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} fort.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, served on the flagship as long as his hands could hold a scalpel. When age and fatigue took his strength and talent, the Vivisector was honourably servitorised by Genetor Ferrenz, and continued his work for the Rogue Trader.
